html:
Pillars are Structures found in Caves and Ruins. They cannot be interacted with or removed without the use of Console Commands. They can obstruct the player's view and movement, and only serve a decorative role.

Pillars, Cave Rock and Flintless, matching other resources in the biomes they are found in. While visually distinct, they are functionally identical to the original Cave Pillar.

In the A New Reign expansion, a new variant of Pillars can be found in the Atrium Biome. Similar to the Ruins version, they will change colors when the Ancient Gateway is activated.

In the Return of Them expansion, the Forgotten Knowledge update introduced Archive Pillars in the Ancient Archive biome. They come in normal and broken versions.

In the Ancient Echoes update, Sanctum Pillars were introduced in the Sanctum biome. They come in normal and broken versions.

Gallery

  • An Atrium Pillar during the Nightmare phase.
  • An Atrium Pillar during the Nightmare phase, with Nightmare phase color filter.
  • Pillar found in the Caves level.
  • Ancient pillars change color during the Nightmare phase of the Nightmare Cycle.
  • A Slimy Pillar found in the Ruins during the Calm Phase of the Nightmare Cycle.
  • A variation of Sanctum Pillar
  • A variation of Sanctum Pillar
  • A variation of Sanctum Pillar

They can obstruct the player's view and movement, and only serve a decorative role. Pillars, Cave Rock and Flintless, matching other resources in the biomes they are found in. While visually distinct, they are functionally identical to the original Cave Pillar. In the ''[[A New Reign]]'' expansion, a new variant of Pillars can be found in the [[Atrium]] Biome. Similar to the Ruins version, they will change colors when the [[Ancient Gateway]] is activated. In the ''[[Return of Them]]'' expansion, the ''[[Return of Them#Forgotten Knowledge|Forgotten Knowledge]]'' update introduced Archive Pillars in the [[Ancient Archive]] biome. They come in normal and broken versions. In the ''[[Ancient Echoes]]'' update, Sanctum Pillars were introduced in the [[Sanctum]] biome.
